value: Go to linux4noobs r/linux4noobs • 2y ago Mykoliux-1 What is POSIX standard and what benefit do Distributions have if they comply with it ? learning/research Hello. I was curious how significant is POSIX standard ? Do distributions try to comply with it and what are the benefits of doing so ? If I am writing a script is it worth being POSIX compliant ? I have heard that it can be really difficult to achieve and the benefits might be small compared to the effort that needs to be put to get that achieved.
